Commit 3e9f (branch main). All ACs verified with evidence:
AC1 (.cursor/mcp.json resolves against project venv from a fresh clone): file uses ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python — portable, no machine-specific path.
AC2 (start command launches + enumerates >=7 resources): in-memory FastMCP Client lists 7 resources; `python -m ob.mcp_server` starts over stdio with no crash (subprocess check); test TestMCPServerRegistration passes.
AC3 (README documents loading + how to confirm connected): README "MCP Server" section updated with mcp.json + verification command.
AC4 (demo.md explicit MCP verification step + expected content): pre-flight checklist MCP line + "Show it (MCP)" beat showing conventions://deprecated-apis content.
AC5 (no hardcoded absolute machine-specific path): uses ${workspaceFolder}.
Note: final Cursor-UI "connected" confirmation is a documented reload step (README + demo pre-flight); the start command itself is verified working.

AC5 (suite green, ruff clean): 65 tests pass, ruff check + format clean.

Commit 9753f4c on main. AC1 (histogram equalization -> skimage/exposure/): test_keyword_routing + test_scaffold_routes_equalization_to_exposure pass. AC4 (sensible default when no match): default_directory=skimage/filters/ in profile, used by scaffold; test_unmatched_task_returns_none confirms None->caller default. AC5 (>=5 mappings + regression covered): 6 parametrized + regression + whole-word + e2e. AC6 (ruff clean, suite green): 75 tests pass, ruff check + format clean.

Done + verified. ob check examples/bad-first-contrib = 5 SK-* violations; --profile profiles/diffusers.yaml = 2 DIFF-*, zero SK-*. 77 tests pass, ruff clean. Docs (demo/deck/decisions/README) narrate the swap. Default prefix stays SK so scikit-image assertions unchanged.

USER-CONFIRMED via gh CLI. The token now has repo+workflow scopes and reads this private repo's Actions; the earlier 404 was a stale session, not a permanent block. Evidence — run 28242226261 on main, conclusion=success: AC1 gh run list shows 3 recent main runs all 'success'. AC2 all 5 jobs success (Lint & Format; Test; ob check bad-first-contrib expect-fail; ob check safe-first-contrib expect-pass; Role Briefs -> Step Summary). AC3 Test job executed tests/test_mcp_server.py (TestMCPResources/ResourceConsistency/ServerRegistration/CheckTool) -> 77 passed in 3.11s, proving fastmcp is installed in CI (not skipped). AC4 every job pins 'uv venv --python 3.12' (ci.yml 19/29/38/55/64) -> satisfies requires-python>=3.12. AC5 briefs job writes PM/QA/DevOps briefs to $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY (ci.yml 66-91). Done + verified. (1) onboarding-copilot.mdc (alwaysApply:true) created — declares MCP tool+resources, CLI commands, profile YAML, automatic behaviors, SDLC-stage rule cross-references. (2) sdlc-implementation.mdc glob widened from nonexistent **/skimage/**/*.py to **/*.py. sdlc-review.mdc broadened to {**/BRIEFS.md,examples/**/*.py}. (3) AGENTS.md now has full onboarding copilot section with tool inventory, when-to-use guidance, and key file table — non-Cursor agents (Claude Code, Codex) discover ob/MCP/profile. (4) scikit-image-conventions.mdc notes profile-driven rule_prefix and references MCP check_workspace tool. (5) MCP server docstrings de-hardcoded from scikit-image to "active profile." (6) CI bumped checkout@v4→v5 (Node24, no deprecation warnings). 77 tests pass, ruff clean.

AC1: fresh scaffold passes ruff (ruff check . clean incl workspaces/; test_stubs_pass_ruff_check). Removed unused numpy from source+test stubs. AC2: tasks containing build/shared no longer falsely refused (test_does_not_falsely_refuse_build_word/shared_word) — refusal now matches underscored forbidden leaf or full path via _references_forbidden_path. AC3: genuine forbidden targets still refused (test_refuses_forbidden_path/shared_path; demo.sh Section 4 shows refusal). AC4: bash demo.sh runs end-to-end to 'All sections demonstrated successfully' (activates .venv, dropped set -e so by-design ob-check exit 1 no longer aborts). Slug/module edge cases handled (test_numeric/symbol_task). 82 tests pass.

Rewrote checks AST-first. AC1: plain 'import skimage._shared.utils' flagged SK-F-001 (test_detects_plain_forbidden_import) — _imported_modules now covers ast.Import+ImportFrom. AC2: attribute usage ski.filters.median(...) flagged SK-D-001 (test_detects_deprecated_attribute_usage) via import-binding resolution. AC3: src-layout forbidden import fires DIFF-F-001 (test_diffusers_forbidden_import_fires_with_src_layout) via new profile.import_root='src/' stripping. AC4: numpydoc fn missing Examples flagged (test_flags_missing_required_docstring_section) — docstring check now enforces required_sections for any style, one DOC-001/fn. Counts re-locked: test_bad_contrib_count_locked==5 SK, test_diffusers_bad_contrib_count_locked==2 DIFF. safe example still passes. 88 tests, ruff clean.

AC3: non-UTF-8 file skipped not fatal (test_non_utf8_file_does_not_crash) via _safe_read. 93 tests, ruff clean.
